body: This PR is an attempt to make `parsed_args_from_ARGS_string` more robust, in that it will be less sensitive to multiple whitespaces in the CL arg list. ref #804.
title: Make parsed_args_from_ARGS_string more robust

body: This PR changes the default surface scheme to nothing. So we will need to set e.g. `--surface_scheme bulk` in the command line argument if we want surface flux in the future. cc @jiahe23
title: change default surface scheme to nothing

body: This PR changes our flame graphs from using ChromeProfileFormat to using ProfileCanvas, which allows us to directly generate html. This is nice because we can upload this as an artifact and don't need to upload the profile into a bucket on the google cloud in order to pass the URI to the firefox profile visualizer
title: Use ProfileCanvas, rm ChromeProfileFormat
